step_texts: User requests deleting captured cards and threads only; must run mandatory identity bootstrap first.
Tree succeeded and revealed root plus subdirs including AGENTS.md at /. Continue mandatory bootstrap.
Loaded root rulebook. Must complete bootstrap by calling context before task actions.
Identity bootstrap completed (tree, AGENTS.md, context). Additional session-start rule requires reading /90_memory/Soul.md before proceeding.
Session bootstrap complete including soul file. Need identify exact card/thread files and preserve templates.
Cards directory enumerated; includes five dated cards and one template. Need threads list next.
Need satisfy deletion discipline by reading each file before deleting; target set currently non-template files under 02_distill/cards and 02_distill/threads.
Confirmed first candidate is a distilled card file. Continue reading all deletion candidates to satisfy read-before-delete rule.
Proceed through remaining candidates sequentially.
Continue reading candidates.
Continue final card then threads.
All dated cards read. Need read threads before deletion.
Need final thread read then can delete all confirmed dated cards/threads.
All target non-template card/thread files were read and confirmed. Ready to execute scoped deletions only in 02_distill/cards and 02_distill/threads.
First targeted deletion succeeded. Continue removing remaining read-and-confirmed captured cards/threads only.
Proceed with remaining deletions.
Continue deleting confirmed targets.
Continue remaining target deletions.
All dated cards removed. Now delete the two dated thread files.
One thread remains to delete, then verify no other changes.
Target deletions done. Need verify only templates remain in cards/threads.
Cards verification passed. Verify threads directory now.
Verified requested removals complete and templates untouched.
